scripts.build:application-projection: pnpm --dir experiments/application-projection clean && pnpm --dir experiments/application-projection build
scripts.build:proof-guided-web-change: pnpm run build:application-projection && pnpm run prepare:proof-guided-web-change && pnpm --dir experiments/proof-guided-web-change clean && pnpm --dir experiments/proof-guided-web-change build
scripts.build:proof-guided-cta-change: pnpm run build:application-projection && pnpm run prepare:proof-guided-cta-change && pnpm --dir experiments/proof-guided-cta-change clean && pnpm --dir experiments/proof-guided-cta-change build
scripts.prepare:proof-guided-web-change-app: pnpm run prepare:proof-guided-web-change && pnpm run prepare:proof-guided-cta-change && pnpm --dir apps/proof-guided-web-change install --ignore-workspace --no-lockfile --offline
scripts.build:proof-guided-web-change-app: pnpm run build:proof-guided-web-change && pnpm run build:proof-guided-cta-change && pnpm run prepare:proof-guided-web-change-app && pnpm --dir apps/proof-guided-web-change clean && pnpm --dir apps/proof-guided-web-change build
scripts.clean: pnpm -r clean && pnpm --dir experiments/application-projection clean && pnpm --dir experiments/proof-guided-web-change clean && pnpm --dir experiments/proof-guided-cta-change clean && pnpm --dir apps/proof-guided-web-change clean
scripts.test: node scripts/check-openclaw-plugin-versions.mjs && pnpm -r test && pnpm test:proof-guided-web-change && pnpm test:proof-guided-cta-change && pnpm test:proof-guided-web-change-app:prepared && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-local test:grounded && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-local test:meaning && pnpm test:semantic-compaction && node scripts/check-package-capabilities.mjs && node scripts/check-package-install-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-private-workbench-transfer.mjs && node scripts/check-private-workbench-provisioning-safety.mjs && node scripts/check-public-client-boundary.mjs
scripts.test:application-projection: pnpm run build:application-projection && pnpm --dir experiments/application-projection test
scripts.test:proof-guided-web-change: pnpm run test:proof-guided-web-change-boundary && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-core build && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-runner-playwright build && pnpm run prepare:proof-guided-web-change && pnpm --dir experiments/proof-guided-web-change test
scripts.verify:proof-guided-web-change: pnpm run test:proof-guided-web-change && pnpm run formal:build
scripts.test:proof-guided-cta-change: pnpm run test:proof-guided-web-change-boundary && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-core build && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-runner-playwright build && pnpm run prepare:proof-guided-cta-change && pnpm --dir experiments/proof-guided-cta-change test
scripts.verify:proof-guided-cta-change: pnpm run test:proof-guided-cta-change && pnpm run formal:build
scripts.test:proof-guided-web-change-app:prepare: pnpm run test:proof-guided-web-change-app-boundary && pnpm run prepare:proof-guided-web-change-app && pnpm --dir apps/proof-guided-web-change test
scripts.test:proof-guided-web-change-app: pnpm run build:proof-guided-web-change-app && pnpm run test:proof-guided-web-change-app:prepared
scripts.verify:proof-guided-web-change-app: pnpm run test:proof-guided-web-change-app && pnpm run formal:build
scripts.test:semantic-compaction: pnpm test:application-projection && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-core build && pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-local build && node --require ./scripts/deny-network.cjs experiments/semantic-compaction/release-artifact.test.mjs && node --require ./scripts/deny-network.cjs experiments/semantic-compaction/document-transformation.test.mjs && RIDDLE_PROOF_APPLICATION_PROJECTION_INTEGRATION=1 node --require ./scripts/deny-network.cjs experiments/semantic-compaction/commercial-record-reconciliation/commercial-record-reconciliation.test.mjs && RIDDLE_PROOF_APPLICATION_PROJECTION_INTEGRATION=1 pnpm --filter @riddledc/riddle-proof-runner-playwright test:browser-transition
scripts.version-packages: changeset version && pnpm -r --if-present sync:openclaw-plugin-version && pnpm install --lockfile-only
